title: 1 Ii ne de Skirt ga 0.1mm Mijikaku Naru Class no Jimi na Onnanoko, Gojitsudan-hen
titleRomaji: 1 Ii ne de Skirt ga 0.1mm Mijikaku Naru Class no Jimi na Onnanoko, Gojitsudan-hen
titleNative: 1いいねでスカートが0.1mm短くなるクラスの地味な女の子　ー後日談編ー
synonyms: 大学生になった地味子とギャル
Daigakusei ni Natta Jimiko to Gal
居残りで二人三脚の練習する地味子とギャル
Iru Nokori de Ninin Sankyaku no Renshuu suru Jimiko to Gal
ギャルと待ち合わせ中に声を掛けられた地味子
Gal to Machiawasechuu ni Koe wo Kakerareta Jimiko
This Plain Girl's Skirt Will Shrink by 0.1mm for Every Like: After Story
synopsis: Continuation of 1 Ii ne de Skirt ga 0.1mm Mijikaku Naru Class no Jimi na Onnanoko , irregularly updated by the author. Includes the following comics and more: 1) Daigakusei ni Natta Jimiko to Gal (大学生になった地味子とギャル) 2) Iru Nokori de Ninin Sankyaku no Renshuu suru Jimiko to Gal (居残りで二人三脚の練習する地味子とギャル) 3-4) Gal to Machiawasechuu ni Koe wo Kakerareta Jimiko (ギャルと待ち合わせ中に声を掛けられた地味子) 5) Oyakusoku (お約束) 6) Gakkou Kaeri Issho ni Shitagi wo Minikita Jimiko to Gal (学校帰り一緒に下着を見に来た地味子とギャル)

tags.name: Yuri
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two females, not inherently sexual. Also known as Girls' Love.

tags.name: Gyaru
tags.description: Prominently features a female character who has a distinct American-emulated fashion style, such as tanned skin, bleached hair, and excessive makeup. Also known as gal.

tags.name: LGBTQ+ Themes
tags.description: Prominently features characters or themes associated with the LGBTQ+ community, such as sexuality or gender identity.
